title: Plugin signing surface
description: Implement plugin signing with cryptographic verification. Add signature generation, verification, and revocation. Expose via /api/v1/plugins/sign and /api/v1/plugins/verify.

title: Marketplace skeleton
description: Create marketplace UI with plugin listing, search, install/uninstall flow. Add plugin ratings, reviews, and trust indicators.

title: Plugin governance doc
description: Create plugin governance documentation: submission process, review criteria, trust levels, revocation policy.

title: CI templates
description: Create CI/CD templates for plugin testing, security scanning, and deployment. Add GitHub Actions workflows.

title: Hub endpoints
description: Extend hub API with plugin discovery, installation, and update endpoints. Add version management and dependency resolution.

title: Create Phase 7 runbook
description: Create runbook for plugin incident response: signing failures, marketplace issues, CI pipeline failures.

title: Update parity scorecard for Ecosystem axis
description: Fill in parity scorecard for Ecosystem axis: feature coverage, quality, observability, evidence. Mark status as completed.

title: Phase 7 gate review
description: Run gate review against criteria 7.1-7.5. Document results in phase7_gating.md. Get sign-off to proceed to Phase 8.
